basics.name: Liu Shu Rui (Jack)
basics.label: Technical Architect (VP) at Crédit Agricole CIB
basics.summary: DevOps & Full-Stack Engineer & Team Leader & Solution Architect with 20+ years of experience building prototype and production systems from the ground up. 6+ years as a tech lead (up to 10 members) practicing Scrum/Agile with a servant leadership style. Expertise in AI/LLM-powered solutions (agentic workflows, RAG, Knowledge Graphs, DSPy), cloud-native architectures (AWS, Azure, GCP, Alibaba), Kubernetes, DevSecOps, GitOps, and event-driven systems. Proficient in TypeScript, Python, C#, Java, Go, Rust, C/C++, Dart, and more. Experienced across banking, healthcare, gaming, SCADA, and enterprise domains.

work.name: Crédit Agricole CIB
work.summary: Modernize legacy systems to Cloud (GCP, AWS) and Kubernetes-native architectures. Improve team productivity through CI/CD, shift-left testing, and AI spec-driven development. Review architectures as a member of the architect panel.
highlights: Migrated systems with 20+ years of legacy by resolving compatibility issues and guiding teams through migration
Reduced development effort by 10x-100x via spec-driven development methodologies
Designed and implemented Current Account and Term Deposit modules using spec-kit and BIAN model
Transformed batch-based system into real-time solution using Linux kernel APIs (fanotify), improving business performance
Reduced troubleshooting time from weeks to minutes by developing custom internal utility tools
Accelerated development environment setup from days to seconds with internal DevContainers
Reduced costs and improved efficiency by optimizing prompts, agents.md and skills.md using DSPy

work.name: Synapxe
work.summary: Conduct market research and competitor analysis to refine product roadmaps. Enhance internal FHIR server products. Support project teams on FHIR-related technical matters.
highlights: Achieved unlimited scalability and saved operational costs by implementing a DynamoDB FHIR backend
Reduced configuration effort by 2x-5x by authoring a JSON Schema for data validation and code autocompletion
Set strategic direction through comprehensive research of the FHIR server market

work.name: NTUC ARU
work.summary: Envision, communicate, and evolve enterprise architecture. Review designs from vendors. Propose solutions based on requirements. Stakeholder and vendor liaison. DevSecOps & SRE.
highlights: Successfully delivered architecture activities across 6 projects in different stages
Reduced costs and improved quality of systems by identifying and proposing better design and implementation approaches

work.name: Bidot Technology Pte Ltd (formerly Dong Er)
work.position: Team Lead & Full-stack Engineer & Solution Architect
work.summary: Provide technical solutions for cloud-based projects (gaming platform, VPN, hospital management system). Lead DevOps team (5), frontend Flutter developers (2), and DBA (1). R&D new technologies to improve productivity and developer experiences.
highlights: Recruited, grew and led a team of ~10 (QA, frontend, backend, designer, Infra) from scratch
Pioneered microservices, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, GitOps and 12-factor principles in gaming platform
Reduced costs to half of machines (800+) and network transfer
Saved at least 100 man-months cost for hospital management system by choosing correct framework and training staff
Gathered and analyzed competitor information using Open-source intelligence (OSINT)

work.name: Asia Fusion Technologies Pte Ltd
work.summary: Deliver solution architecture according to project requirements. Lead teams following good software engineering practices and design methodology. Gather business requirements and translate into functional specifications. Evaluate new technologies and report industry trends.
highlights: Grew and led a cross-functional team (3 Senior Devs, 2 Big Data Engineers, 2 DBAs)
Integrated VoIP call centre, Worldpay, and gaming from different vendors
Built fraud detection using neural network-based facial recognition system
Developed game recommendation system based on content-based filtering
Integrated Business Intelligence (PowerBI, Tableau)
Maintained 2 hours downtime for 8 years as DBA team lead (Oracle, PostgreSQL)
Avoided compression license cost using Data Guard workaround (SSH compression + AutoSSH)

work.name: Combuilder
work.summary: Analyze problems and requirements, propose solutions at product system level. Provide technical guidance to team members. Manage SCADA and product core domain subsystems.
highlights: Cut building time to 1/4 using ccache, distributed cache and makefile with multiple jobs
Delivered 2 modules successfully across two projects

work.name: Y3 Technologies Pte Ltd
work.summary: Design JEE and BPM systems. Architect integrated CRM, Portal and Business Intelligence (Pentaho) solutions. Design ETL for data migration into data warehouse. Design integrated security solutions.

work.name: ST Electronics (Software Services) Pte Ltd
work.position: Team Leader / Senior Software Engineer / Technical Leader
work.summary: Worked as team lead within the Technical Architecture team for JEE/DotNet systems architecting, design and implementation. Managed 6-8 developers. Responsible for project schedule, cost and quality across the full lifecycle. Coordinated with customers and resolved technical issues.

work.name: eBuilds Technology Ltd
work.summary: Software development, system maintenance, requirements gathering, and functional specifications. Migrated legacy systems to web-based applications.

work.name: New World Cyberbase Co. Ltd
work.summary: Engaged in Java J2EE software development projects, system maintenance, requirements gathering, and functional specifications. Implemented WAP game and telecom system. Unit and system testing, design and test documentation.

work.name: Wuhan HongRen Information Co. Ltd
work.summary: Software development and system testing in Business Entity Management domain using Oracle and PowerBuilder technologies.
